content.problemStatement:
Write a program using a 'for' loop to find and print the index of the first occurrence of the number 8 in any given list of NNN integers.

Check the sample input / output below for further details.

Note that your output needs to take into account that the array is 000 indexed.


Input Format

First line of input contains a positive integer NNN - the length of the input array.
Second line of input contains NNN space separated integers - the elements of the array.


Output Format

Output a single integer - the index (0 - based) of the first occurrence of the number 8.

sampleTestCases.explanation:
Explanation:
The first occurrence of the number 8 is at the 2nd index.
